summary: Tested 8-step Daily Close Wizard at /close-wizard and two 1-click reports (Low Stock Alert, Supplier Payables). All 18 backend tests pass. All wizard frontend flows tested end-to-end with Main Branch - Downtown. Manager PIN (521325) verified successfully. Day was NOT actually closed during testing.

issues: Safe/Drawer inputs are pre-filled based on `expected_counter` (₱7,849) at page load, NOT based on `actualCash` entered in step 5 (₱500). When actual cash is lower than expected, the pre-fill shows Unallocated=-₱7,349 amber warning. User must manually adjust. Also: Confirm Allocation doesn't validate safe+drawer <= actual — that check only fires in handleCloseDay. Minor UX improvement: could update pre-fill when actualCash changes, or add inline validation to Confirm Allocation button.

design_issues.screen: Step 1/3 Sales Log & AR Payments - Table rendering
issues: Console warning: 'In HTML, span cannot be a child of tbody' (React hydration warning). Occurs in empty state rendering of cash_entries and AR payments tables. Not a visible bug but violates HTML structure rules. React wraps conditional empty-state <tr> in span. Fix: move empty state outside tbody or use a fragment wrapper.

no_branch_message.notes: With 'All Branches' selected, wizard shows 'Please select a branch first to run the Close Wizard.'

wizard_loads_with_branch.notes: After selecting Main Branch - Downtown, wizard loads with correct branch name and date (2026-02-21)

all_8_steps_visible.notes: All 8 steps visible in stepper: Sales Log, Customer Credits, AR Payments, Expenses, Cash Count, Fund Allocation, Close & Sign Off, Open Tomorrow

all_8_steps_clickable.notes: All 8 stepper buttons are clickable and navigate to correct step

step1_sales_log.notes: Shows cash sales summary (Cash Sales ₱0.00, Credit ₱0.00, Total Entries: 0), table with #/Product/Qty/Amount/Running Total columns, Quick Add Sale button, Full Sales Panel link, Mark Complete button

step2_customer_credits.notes: Shows credit invoices section, cashout AR credits section, 'No credit activity today' empty state, Total Credit Extended summary

step3_ar_payments.notes: Table headers: CUSTOMER/INVOICE, BAL BEFORE, INTEREST, PENALTY, PAID, REMAINING, action column. Total Received: ₱0.00 shown. 'No AR payments received today' empty state. +Pay button rendered in data rows

step4_expenses.notes: Description 'All expenses recorded today. Employee advances show monthly totals.' visible. Add Expense button present. 'No expenses today' empty state. Total Expenses: ₱0.00

step5_cash_count.notes: Shows Starting Float (₱7,849), Total Cash In (₱0), Total Expenses (₱0), Expected in Drawer (₱7,849). Actual Cash Count input accepts number. Over/Short box updates dynamically (₱-7,349 for ₱500 actual). Confirm Cash Count button appears after entering amount

step6_fund_allocation.notes: Actual Cash Available shown, Transfer to Safe + Stay in Register inputs, Allocated/Unallocated summary, Confirm Allocation button enabled only after step 5 done

step7_close_signoff.notes: Z-Report shows all 8 metrics. Warning when steps 5/6 not complete. Manager PIN input present. PIN 521325 verified → 'Signed off by Janmark Ahig' toast and green badge. Close Accounts button enabled after PIN verify. Button shows 'Close Accounts for 2026-02-21'. Permanent action warning text shown.

step8_open_tomorrow.notes: Shows 'Complete Step 7 (Close & Sign Off) first' with 'Go to Step 7' button when day not yet closed. Would show success state after actual day close.

low_stock_report_dialog.notes: Low Stock Report button opens dialog with title 'Low Stock Alert — Main Branch - Downtown'. Returns 'All products are adequately stocked!' (correct - 2 negative qty products are filtered out by active/is_repack query). Dialog properly positioned.

supplier_payables_dialog.notes: Supplier Payables button opens dialog with title 'Outstanding Supplier Payables'. Returns 'No outstanding payables!' (no unpaid POs). 'Go to Pay Supplier' navigation button present.

backend_low_stock_api.notes: GET /api/low-stock-alert returns 200, list structure, correct fields (name, sku, current_qty, status, unit, category, reorder_point, reorder_quantity). Status values: out_of_stock or low_stock. Sorts out_of_stock before low_stock.

backend_supplier_payables_api.notes: GET /api/supplier-payables returns 200, list structure, all required fields including urgency flags (is_overdue, is_urgent, days_until_due). Sorted: overdue first, then urgent, then pending.

manager_pin_verification.notes: POST /api/auth/verify-manager-pin with PIN 521325 returns valid=True, manager_name='Janmark Ahig'. Invalid PIN returns valid=False.

nav_close_wizard.notes: Close Wizard nav item visible in sidebar. Requires reports.close_day permission (owner has this).

action_items: MINOR: Step 6 Fund Allocation - pre-fill safe/drawer values should use actual_cash (from step 5) rather than expected_counter. Currently shows large unallocated amount when actual cash differs from expected.

MINOR: React HTML hydration warning - 'span cannot be child of tbody' in Sales Log (step 1) and AR Payments (step 3) table empty states. Move empty <tr> outside the {!data.length && ...} conditional or use Array.from check.

INFO: Low Stock dialog shows 'All stocked' for Main Branch - Downtown because the 2 products with negative inventory quantities are filtered out (inactive or is_repack=true). Verify this is expected behavior or adjust product active flags.
critical_code_review_comments: CloseWizardPage.js L646: Confirm Allocation (step 6) does not validate safe+drawer <= actualCash. Validation only fires in handleCloseDay(). User can mark step 6 complete with mismatched allocation and then get a surprise error at step 7 close. Consider adding inline validation feedback on the Confirm Allocation button.

CloseWizardPage.js L107-114: Pre-fill uses expected_counter for safe/drawer split, but this is calculated before user enters actualCash. The pre-fill is misleading when actual cash deviates significantly. Better UX: update cashToSafe/cashToDrawer when actualCash changes in step 5.

React hydration warning in table components (L393-408, L487-513): empty state <tr> wrapped in conditional render causes React to inject span inside tbody. Fix: use (arr.length === 0) ? [<tr>empty</tr>] : arr.map(...) pattern or render empty state outside the table.
seed_data_creation: No seed data created. Day was NOT closed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Close Wizard at /close-wizard is fully functional. Branch 'Main Branch - Downtown' (id: da114e26-fd00-467f-8728-6b8047a244b5). Owner PIN: 521325. Manager verified as 'Janmark Ahig'. Day is still OPEN for 2026-02-21 (not closed during testing). Backend /api/low-stock-alert and /api/supplier-payables both pass. Low Stock returns empty list for this branch (products filtered by active+is_repack). No payables. test_close_wizard.py (18 tests) is the regression test file for wizard backend.

rca_of_issues.step6_prefill_mismatch: Pre-fill runs once on loadWizardData() using expected_counter. When actualCash=500 but expected=7849, safe=5494+drawer=2355=7849 but actual only 500 → shows Unallocated=-7349. Not a data loss bug since handleCloseDay validates safe+drawer <= actual before executing close.
rca_of_issues.react_hydration_warning: React conditional rendering {!(arr.length) && <tr>...</tr>} gets wrapped in React internal span elements when inside ScrollArea, violating HTML table structure. Fixed by using ternary outside scroll area or proper conditional in JSX.
